expected_behavior: Loads maximo-inventory with maximo-overview as parent
Queries MATUSETRANS, not WPMATERIAL (WPMATERIAL is planned, not consumed)
Filters MATUSETRANS.ISSUETYPE IN ('ISSUE','RETURN') and nets them out — does NOT include TRANSFER or ADJUSTMENT
Filters TRANSDATE to the last 3 months
Aggregates by ITEMNUM (with ITEM description joined for readability)
Returns top 10 by net quantity consumed
